title: More Trails & More Tales
description: An expansion to Minecraft's 1.20 update. New structures, cosmetics, more!
body:
Trails and Tales was a successful update in Minecraft. Why not expand on it by adding more content?

 

Features

-Two new structures: Micropolis Ruins and Cherry Grove Dojo.

-New Armor Trims: Wisdom and Honor, found in new structures.

-Echo Shards and Netherite Scraps can be used as trim materials.

-New pottery sherds and statues!

-More block types for existing stone variants!

-New Samurai mob that defends Cherry Grove Dojo, if you get too close to him you'll face the consequences.
